nasb.text: But who has stood in the council of the Lord, That he should see and hear His word? Who has given heed to His word and listened?

esv.text: For who among them has stood in the council of the Lord to see and to hear his word, or who has paid attention to his word and listened?

cnv.text: 可是他們中間有誰曾參與耶和華的議會， 看見或聽見他的話呢？ 有誰曾留心聽他的話而實在聽見呢？

ccb.text: “然而，他们谁曾站在耶和华面前看见并听见祂说话呢？ 他们谁曾留心听祂的话呢？
